item.title: Version 1.0.14-dev.3
item.sparkle:releaseNotes:
• Merge branch 'dev' of github.com:vavilov2212/worklog_studio into dev
  • release: windows v1.0.14-dev.3
  • docs: journal entry for legend affordance fix
  • style(charts): drop chevron and click cursor from the legend +N more row
  • docs: journal entry for legend cap, table percent and English seed
  • feat(charts): cap donut legends at six rows with a +N more tooltip
  • feat(reports): progress bars relative to busiest project, percent in hours column
  • chore(tool): dev-db seeder data in English
  • docs: journal entry for dev-db seeding
  • chore(tool): windows dev-db seeder with two months of realistic activity
  • docs: journal entry for donut legend overflow fix
  • fix(charts): donut legends flex instead of overflowing the charts card
  • docs: post-mortem and journal for chart sync follow-up
  • feat(home): open-in-reports jump carrying period and chart view with explanatory tooltip
  • style(reports): thicken table progress bars to match chart weight
  • refactor(common): shared StackedBarChart widget for dashboard and reports
  • refactor(common): shared ChartBar models and stacked bucket builders for both aggregators
  • docs: post-mortem entry and journal for reports charts block
  • feat(reports): hover legend overlay for stacked bar chart
  • feat(reports): charts card with project and task donuts and stacked bar view
  • feat(reports): add chart view state to ReportsBloc
  • feat(reports): add stacked per-project bar buckets to ReportsAggregator
  • feat(reports): add flat byTask slices to ReportsAggregator
  • refactor(common): extract chartScale axis math into shared util
  • docs: work journal and plan dependency appendix for reports charts block
  • refactor(home): move DashboardChartView enum to dashboard_chart_aggregator
  • docs: spec and plan for reports charts block redesign
